title: Aiode Ai For Music Creators, Producers, Singers-songwriters - AIODE
text:
To view this video please enable JavaScript, and consider upgrading to a web browser that
supports HTML5 video
The First Musicians-Based STEM Generator
Try Now
NO CREDIT CARD NEEDED
Scroll
Experience Limitless Creativity with
Artist-Based AI Models
1. Choose Your Virtual AI Model
Select the models you’d like to collaborate with from our wide range of ethical artist-based models.
2. We Listen to Your Music
Let our AI models adapt to your creation and respond to your selected songs.
3. Guide the Performance
Guide the virtual musicians’ performance or let them take the lead, bringing their expertise to your song, whether for a specific section or the entire track.
4. Generate and Refine
Generate new takes and fine-tune each musician’s performance, instrument, and style to match your vision, directing their special abilities, as if you were sitting together in a studio.
5. Export
Download or drag & drop
high-quality 24bit stereo files
directly
into your DAW for further editing, mixing and mastering.
Try Now
How it works
Real Musicians at the Core
We collaborate with real musicians who select instruments, genres, and styles for their virtual counterparts, ensuring their unique artistry is fully represented.
We Create a Unique Models
we embed the unique essence of real artists into our proprietary AI models, reflecting their style and feel.
By Capturing their Essence
We meticulously record every nuance of their performance, capturing every subtle detail and unique characteristic of their style in the virtual model.
The
AIODE
Music AI Engine
Our
proprietary
engine mirrors the style, thought processes and decision-making of real artists, delivering authentic music creation experiences through our variety of music AI models.
Ethical AI Starts with
Artist Collaboration
Our AI music models are ethically trained, produced and licensed while ensuring every artist is safeguarded and respected
Full Participation
Our
artists
play a crucial role in the modeling process, selecting instruments, genres and styles for their virtual counterparts. They are involved at every step, from the initial modeling to hearing their virtual selves’ first performance.
Protection and Ethical Use
Aiode
is committed to ethical use and protection of
artists
’ contributions. We utilize narrow, supervised machine learning and siloed use of training data to ensure that artists’ recordings are safeguarded and used responsibly.
We aid Discovery
Aiode
offers artists opportunities to be discovered by a global community, enabling unique collaborations across geographical and cultural boundaries. Whether you’re a bedroom producer, songwriter, or world-renowned composer,
Aiode
provides a platform to showcase your skills and connect with a diverse range of creators.
Revenue Sharing with Artists
Aiode
’s collaborative ecosystem allows musicians to create new revenue streams. While they continue their gigs and sessions, their virtual counterparts collaborate with various music creators on our platform. All artists who contribute to the platform are fairly compensated through a revenue-sharing model designed to expand their reach and grow their earnings.
Apply Now
